# Bettbox vVERSION

A multi-platform proxy client powered by Mihomo / Clash Meta core.

## Downloads

**Android** (8.0+)
- [ARMv8](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-android-arm64-v8a.apk)
- [x86_64](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-android-x86_64.apk)
- [ARMv7](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-android-armeabi-v7a.apk)
- [Universal](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-android-universal.apk)

**Windows** (10+)
- [x64 Setup](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-windows-amd64-setup.exe)
- [ARM64 Setup](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-windows-arm64-setup.exe)
- [x64 Setup (Compatible)](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-windows-amd64-compatible-setup.exe)

**macOS** (12.0+)
- [Apple Silicon](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-macos-arm64.dmg)
- [Intel x64](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-macos-amd64.dmg)
- [Intel x64 (Compatible)](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-macos-amd64-compatible.dmg)

**Linux** (Kernel 5.4+)
- [AppImage x64](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-linux-amd64.AppImage)
- [DEB x64](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-linux-amd64.deb)
- [DEB ARM64](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-linux-arm64.deb)
- [RPM x64](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-linux-amd64.rpm)
- [DEB x64 (Compatible)](https://github.com/LowOrbitLab/Bettbox/releases/download/vVERSION/Bettbox-VERSION-linux-amd64-compatible.deb)

---

*Older CPUs (pre-2012) should use the "Compatible" versions.*
